creator: morganw@chemikals.org
text:
wpa_supplicant cannot verify a SHA256 signed certificate.

Fix: Apply patch from vendor git respository for bug 323.

http://hostap.epitest.fi/gitweb/gitweb.cgi?p=hostap.git;a=commitdiff;h=e1ffdfc18be9027b5ff9ae254f92b6255930ac71


Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Using XCA or OpenSSL, generate a set of certificates signed with the SHA256 digest. Attempts to use them with wpa_supplicant will fail.
